creator: kenji@kens.fm
text:
vpopmail smtp_auth

Available with FreeBSD10.3R and 10Stable(r312851) 
Unavailable with FreeBSD11.0R




# This file is auto-generated by 'make config'.
# Options for vpopmail-5.4.33_2
_OPTIONS_READ=vpopmail-5.4.33_2
_FILE_COMPLETE_OPTIONS_LIST=AUTH_LOG CLEAR_PASSWD DOCS DOMAIN_QUOTAS FILE_LOCKING FILE_SYNC FPIC IP_ALIAS LEARN_PASSWORDS MAILDROP MD5_PASSWORDS MYSQL_LIMITS MYSQL_REPLICATION ONCHANGE_SCRIPT PASSWD QMAIL_EXT ROAMING SEEKABLE SINGLE_DOMAIN SMTP_AUTH_PATCH SPAMASSASSIN SPAMFOLDER SQL_LOG SQL_LOG_TRIM SUID_VCHKPW USERS_BIG_DIR VALIAS CDB MYSQL PGSQL LDAP LDAP_SASL ORACLE SYBASE
OPTIONS_FILE_SET+=AUTH_LOG
OPTIONS_FILE_SET+=CLEAR_PASSWD
OPTIONS_FILE_SET+=DOCS
OPTIONS_FILE_UNSET+=DOMAIN_QUOTAS
OPTIONS_FILE_SET+=FILE_LOCKING
OPTIONS_FILE_UNSET+=FILE_SYNC
OPTIONS_FILE_SET+=FPIC
OPTIONS_FILE_UNSET+=IP_ALIAS
OPTIONS_FILE_UNSET+=LEARN_PASSWORDS
OPTIONS_FILE_UNSET+=MAILDROP
OPTIONS_FILE_SET+=MD5_PASSWORDS
OPTIONS_FILE_UNSET+=MYSQL_LIMITS
OPTIONS_FILE_UNSET+=MYSQL_REPLICATION
OPTIONS_FILE_UNSET+=ONCHANGE_SCRIPT
OPTIONS_FILE_UNSET+=PASSWD
OPTIONS_FILE_UNSET+=QMAIL_EXT
OPTIONS_FILE_SET+=ROAMING
OPTIONS_FILE_SET+=SEEKABLE
OPTIONS_FILE_UNSET+=SINGLE_DOMAIN
OPTIONS_FILE_SET+=SMTP_AUTH_PATCH
OPTIONS_FILE_UNSET+=SPAMASSASSIN
OPTIONS_FILE_UNSET+=SPAMFOLDER
OPTIONS_FILE_UNSET+=SQL_LOG
OPTIONS_FILE_UNSET+=SQL_LOG_TRIM
OPTIONS_FILE_UNSET+=SUID_VCHKPW
OPTIONS_FILE_SET+=USERS_BIG_DIR
OPTIONS_FILE_UNSET+=VALIAS
OPTIONS_FILE_UNSET+=CDB
OPTIONS_FILE_SET+=MYSQL
OPTIONS_FILE_UNSET+=PGSQL
OPTIONS_FILE_UNSET+=LDAP
OPTIONS_FILE_UNSET+=LDAP_SASL
OPTIONS_FILE_UNSET+=ORACLE
OPTIONS_FILE_UNSET+=SYBASE
